channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Harry Styles Perform ‘Dance No More,’ ‘Coming Up Roses’
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles bringing the grooves on SNL! 🎶 Which performance was your fave? 💃🌹 #HarryStyles #SNL #MusicMagic

item.title: Don Toliver Asserts Superstar Status With High-‘OCTANE’ Performance at Billboard The Stage @ SXSW
item.description: Don Toliver bringing the heat 🔥🎤 Check out how he owned the stage at SXSW! #DonToliver #SXSW2022 #BillboardTheStage 🚀

item.title: ‘Enjoy Your Time Off!’: How the Black Crowes Snatched an Aerosmith Tour From Another Band
item.description: Rock on! The Black Crowes are swooping in to join Aerosmith on tour 🎸 Who's ready for this epic collab? 🤘 #RockLegends #MusicNews

item.title: Derek Trucks Plays Jerry Garcia’s “Tiger” Guitar in Concert Following $11.5 Million Auction Purchase
item.description: 🎸 Derek Trucks rocks out on Jerry Garcia’s “Tiger” guitar after snagging it at auction! Pure musical magic! 🐯 #GuitarGoals #MusicNews

item.title: CMAT Shares “The Jamie Oliver Petrol Station” Video With Jamie Oliver, Covers Girls Aloud With Katy J Pearson
item.description: 🎥🎶 Watch CMAT's quirky new video ft. Jamie Oliver and her Girls Aloud cover with Katy J Pearson! Pure pop magic! ✨ #CMAT #MusicCollab
